Class MergeRuleCompletion

java.lang.Object
de.uka.ilkd.key.gui.mergerule.MergeRuleCompletion
All Implemented Interfaces:
InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
public class MergeRuleCompletion extends Object implements InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
This class completes the instantiation for a merge rule application. The user is queried for partner goals and concrete merge rule to choose. If in forced mode, all potential partners and the if-then-else merge method are chosen (no query is shown to the user).

  • Method Details

    • complete

      public IBuiltInRuleApp complete(IBuiltInRuleApp app, Goal goal, boolean forced)
      Description copied from interface: InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
      method called to complete the given builtin rule application
      Specified by:
      complete in interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
      Parameters:
      app - the app to complete
      goal - the goal where the app will be applied
      forced - a boolean indicating if the user shall be bothered if the instantiation is unique or can be chosen in a reasonable way as if unique
      Returns:
      the completed app or null if completion was not possible

    • canComplete

      public boolean canComplete(IBuiltInRuleApp app)
      Description copied from interface: InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
      checks if this instance is responsible for the given app
      Specified by:
      canComplete in interface InteractiveRuleApplicationCompletion
      Parameters:
      app - the rule app
      Returns:
      true iff this instance might be able to complete the app
